item.description:
What's New in 3.2

  • Added: OpenCode support in Agent Cockpit for live iTerm2 sessions.
  • Added: OpenCode support for newer SQLite-backed session storage.
  • Added: OpenCode live dots, busy-state detection, and search hydration for active sessions.
  • Fixed: Oversized OpenCode raw JSON previews causing noisy rendering.

What's New in 3.1

  • Added: Menu bar toggles for active and waiting session icons.
  • Added: An advanced option to hide the Dock icon while keeping a reopen path.
  • Fixed: Agent Cockpit CPU and energy usage while pinned or backgrounded.
  • Fixed: Agent Cockpit flicker, missing rows, and pinned-window refresh stability.
  • Fixed: Relaunch behavior for the main Agent Sessions window and pinned Agent Cockpit.

Full release notes: https://github.com/jazzyalex/agent-sessions/releases/tag/v3.2
